commands_run: git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main

if rg -n "node\.slug ===|anne-tucker|liquid-bloom|Liquid Bloom|Anne Tucker|Click for Free Healing|Latests Releases|visuals/brand/liquid" 'web/app/presence-walk/node/[slug]/page.tsx'; then exit 1; else echo OK; fi

failure_reason: Follow-up feedback rejected slug-specific hardcoding in the route. The Anne Tucker and Liquid Bloom source layouts were moved into typed presence source-visual data, and the route now renders reusable source-visual templates without checking either slug or embedding their copy/assets in the page component.
